title: Frost's Survival Overhaul
description:
Overhauls the Survival Experience of Minecraft

Credit to ALL of the Mod Developers!
body:
- overhauls and adds features to Minecraft Survival
- improves your experience for the better (or worse depending on how much you like the modpack :D)

**Some Mods**
- Dehydration
- Real Camera
- Thin Air
- Realistic Fire Spread
- Fire Arrows Ignite Fire
- Sound Physics Remastered
- Ambient Sounds
- EnviornmentZ
- and more
